title: Meng Earth Continent
content:
The 
Meng Earth Continent
 is a landmass rich in Earth Essence with around 70% of its lands covered in deserts. The continent is located inside the 
Eastern Continent
 on the 
Immortal Astral Continent
.

Sects
[
]

Earth Sect

Meng Earth Sect

Background
[
]

The continent was allegedly created when the 
Celestial Ancestor
 sealed a foreign Cultivator named Meng, who practiced Earth based Cultivation.
